title: Quality Of Life Mod
description: Adds many misc things: crafts and items.
body:
# Quality Of Life Mod
## **New Items**
### Food

- **Sweet Berries Jam** - restores 10 hunger and 0.6 saturation.

- **Honey Pie** - restores 9 hunger and 0.4 saturation.

- **Carrot Pie** - restores 9 hunger and 0.4 saturation.

- **Cooked Tropical Fish** - restores 5 hunger and 0.7 saturation.

### Coins

- **Copper Coin**
  
- **Golden Coin**
  
- **Emerald Coin**
  
- **Netherite Coin**

### Tools
All Copper Tools has 190 durability
- **Copper Pickaxe** - has mining level of 1
  
- **Copper Axe** - deal 9 damage
  
- **Copper Shovel**
  
- **Copper Hoe**
  
- **Copper Sword** - deal 5 damage

## **New Recipes**
All recipes are at the Gallery.

- **Light**
- **Debug Stick**
- **Saddle**
- **Leather**
- **Bell**
- **Iron Horse Armor**
- **Golden Horse Armor**
- **Diamond Horse Armor**
- **Name Tag**
- **Trident**
- **Enchanted Golden Apple**
- **Crying Obsidian**
